positive: A vibrant, symmetrical celestial fauna illustration featuring a stylized, majestic owl seated on a crescent moon, surrounded by glowing nebula dust and crystalline star trails. The owl has sharp, clean lines and geometric feather patterns. Composition is centrally framed, designed as a repeating textile pattern element. Style is neo-art deco mystical botanical etching meets modern kawaii cartoonism. Strong contrast between deep indigo/midnight blue and glowing cyan/gold accents. Clean, thick outlines, minimalist yet intricate detail. Highly suitable for screen printing on apparel. Digital illustration, vector quality, symmetrical design, high contrast, clean silhouette.
negative: blurry, artifacts, low resolution, text, watermark, logo, messy background, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, oversaturated, poor quality, photorealistic, gradient, signature, muted colors
